example: Our value proposition is that the device lasts twice as long as the leading competitor at the same price.
exampleZh: 我们的 value proposition 是在同样价格下这款设备的使用寿命是主要竞品的两倍。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The main selling point for retailers is the high margin and strong after-sales support.
exampleZh: 对零售商来说主要的 selling point 是高利润和强大的售后支持。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We need to nail the product positioning before we approach distributors.
exampleZh: 在接触分销商之前我们需要确定 product positioning。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Our target customer is a tech-savvy professional who values portability over raw power.
exampleZh: 我们的 target customer 是重视便携性胜过原始性能的技术专业人士。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The best use case to demo is the outdoor scenario because that is where the battery life advantage shows.
exampleZh: 最好的 demo use case 是户外场景因为那是电池寿命优势体现的地方。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Our competitive advantage is the combination of waterproof design and a two-year warranty.
exampleZh: 我们的 competitive advantage 是防水设计与两年保修的 combination。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: I made twenty cold calls this morning and got three follow-up meetings scheduled.
exampleZh: 我今天早上打了二十个 cold call 预约了三次跟进会议。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: We found this prospect through a trade show inquiry from last month.
exampleZh: 我们通过上个月的一次展会询盘找到了这个 prospect。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: Every lead from the website contact form gets a reply within four hours.
exampleZh: 来自网站联系表单的每个 lead 都会在四小时内得到回复。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: Can you connect me with the decision maker for hardware purchasing in your company?
exampleZh: 你能帮我联系贵公司硬件采购的 decision maker 吗？
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: The receptionist is the gatekeeper so be polite and ask for the person by name.
exampleZh: 前台是 gatekeeper 所以要礼貌地直接叫出要找的人的名字。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: Keep the pitch under two minutes and focus on the one thing that makes your product different.
exampleZh: 把 pitch 控制在两分钟以内专注于让你的产品与众不同的那一点。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: I sent the quotation yesterday and I will make a follow-up call on Thursday.
exampleZh: 我昨天发了报价单周四会打一个 follow-up call。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: The most common objection is about the price so we prepared a comparison chart with competitors.
exampleZh: 最常见的 objection 是关于价格所以我们准备了与竞品的对比表。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We are looking for a local agent who already sells into retail chains in the region.
exampleZh: 我们在寻找已经在当地销售到零售连锁店的 local agent。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: A good distributor will handle customs warehousing and local delivery for you.
exampleZh: 一个好的 distributor 会为你处理海关、仓储和本地配送。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We need to recruit at least five dealers in each major city to get decent coverage.
exampleZh: 我们需要在每个主要城市招募至少五个 dealer 才能获得像样的覆盖。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The reseller programme includes training marketing materials and a dedicated account manager.
exampleZh: reseller programme 包括培训营销材料和专属客户经理。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We treat every channel partner as an extension of our own sales team.
exampleZh: 我们把每个 channel partner 都当作我们自己销售团队的延伸。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The partner onboarding process takes about two weeks including product and sales training.
exampleZh: partner onboarding 过程大约需要两周包括产品和销售培训。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We run dealer training sessions every quarter to make sure partners can demo the products properly.
exampleZh: 我们每季度进行 dealer training 以确保合作伙伴能够正确演示产品。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We offered them exclusive distributor status for the Nordic region with a minimum annual target.
exampleZh: 我们给了他们北欧地区的 exclusive distributor 地位附有最低年度目标。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: They want exclusive rights for the territory but we are not sure they can meet the volume.
exampleZh: 他们想要该地区的 exclusive rights 但我们不确定他们是否能达到销量。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Territory protection means we will not sell to another distributor in their assigned area.
exampleZh: territory protection 意味着我们不会卖给他们指定区域的另一个分销商。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Each agent gets a defined sales territory with clear boundaries and a list of target cities.
exampleZh: 每个 agent 都有一个明确的 sales territory 有清晰的边界和目标城市列表。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The minimum sales target for the first year is 5000 units across the assigned territory.
exampleZh: 第一年的 minimum sales target 是在指定区域内销售 5000 台。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The contract includes a performance clause that allows us to terminate if they miss the target two quarters in a row.
exampleZh: 合同包含 performance clause 如果他们连续两个季度未达目标我们有权终止。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The wholesale price depends on the order volume with better rates above 1000 units.
exampleZh: wholesale price 取决于订单量超过 1000 台有更好的价格。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The dealer price is set at 40 percent below MSRP to give partners a healthy margin.
exampleZh: dealer price 设定在 MSRP 以下百分之四十给合作伙伴留下 healthy margin。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The MSRP is ninety-nine dollars but retailers are free to set their own final price.
exampleZh: MSRP 是九十九美元但零售商可以自由设定最终价格。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The dealer margin is too low at twenty percent compared to competing brands that offer thirty.
exampleZh: dealer margin 太低了只有百分之二十而竞品提供百分之三十。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We offer a volume discount of an extra five percent for orders over 2000 units.
exampleZh: 我们为超过 2000 台的订单提供额外百分之五的 volume discount。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: I will send you the quotation by the end of today including shipping costs to your warehouse.
exampleZh: 我今天下班前会把 quotation 发给你包括到你仓库的运费。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Our standard payment terms are thirty percent deposit and seventy percent before shipment.
exampleZh: 我们的标准 payment terms 是百分之三十订金和百分之七十发货前付清。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We need a signed purchase order before we can schedule production for your batch.
exampleZh: 我们需要 signed purchase order 才能为你的批次安排生产。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The proforma invoice shows the unit price quantity and shipping terms before the final order.
exampleZh: proforma invoice 在最终订单之前显示了单价数量和运输条款。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We are exhibiting at the trade show in Berlin next month and need to prepare the booth and samples.
exampleZh: 我们下个月在柏林的 trade show 参展需要准备展位和样机。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The exhibition runs for three days and we expect about twenty thousand visitors.
exampleZh: exhibition 持续三天我们预计大约有两万参观者。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Our booth is in Hall 3 near the main entrance so we should get good foot traffic.
exampleZh: 我们的 booth 在三号馆靠近主入口所以应该会有好的客流。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We shipped three demo units to the exhibition venue and they arrived with some scratches on the casing.
exampleZh: 我们往展馆发了三台 demo unit 外壳有些划痕。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The live demo of the water-resistant feature drew a crowd at our booth every hour.
exampleZh: 防水功能的 live demo 每小时都在我们的 booth 吸引一群人。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We sent a follow-up email to every lead we met at the exhibition within 48 hours.
exampleZh: 我们在展会上遇到的每个 lead 都在 48 小时内发了 follow-up email。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: All three meeting slots for tomorrow morning at the booth are already booked with distributors.
exampleZh: 明天早上 booth 的三个 meeting slot 都已被分销商预订了。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The retail buyer wants to test the product in ten pilot stores before committing to a chain-wide rollout.
exampleZh: retail buyer 想在承诺全连锁铺货前先在十家 pilot store 测试产品。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The category manager for electronics decides which brands get shelf space in that aisle.
exampleZh: 电子产品的 category manager 决定哪些品牌在那一排货架上获得 shelf space。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Getting good shelf space at eye level can make or break a new brand in retail.
exampleZh: 在视线高度获得好的 shelf space 可以决定一个新品牌在零售中的成败。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The listing fee for the electronics aisle was higher than we expected so we need to adjust the budget.
exampleZh: 电子产品通道的 listing fee 比我们预期的要高所以我们需要调整预算。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The sell-through rate in the first month was over eighty percent which means the product is moving fast.
exampleZh: 第一个月的 sell-through rate 超过百分之八十这意味着产品卖得很快。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We placed a small display stand at the point of sale to catch impulse purchases.
exampleZh: 我们在 point of sale 放了一个小展示架用来抓住冲动消费。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The planogram shows exactly where each product should sit on the shelf for maximum visibility.
exampleZh: planogram 精确显示了每个产品应该放在货架的哪个位置以获得最大可见度。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We need CE marking before we can ship to any country in the European Union.
exampleZh: 我们需要 CE marking 才能发货到欧盟的任何国家。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The FCC certification took about six weeks and cost around fifteen thousand dollars.
exampleZh: FCC certification 花了大约六周费用约一万五千美元。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: All components in the device must be RoHS compliant or we cannot sell in Europe.
exampleZh: 设备中的所有组件都必须符合 RoHS 否则我们不能在欧洲销售。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The declaration of conformity must be signed and kept on file for at least ten years.
exampleZh: declaration of conformity 必须签署并存档至少十年。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The test report from the accredited lab confirms the device meets all safety requirements.
exampleZh: 来自认证实验室的 test report 确认该设备符合所有安全要求。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The user manual must be translated into the local language for each country we sell in.
exampleZh: user manual 必须翻译成我们销售的每个国家的当地语言。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The importer of record is legally responsible for ensuring the product meets local regulations.
exampleZh: record 上的 importer 对确保产品符合当地法规负有法律责任。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The standard warranty is one year but we offer an extended three-year warranty for enterprise buyers.
exampleZh: 标准 warranty 是一年但我们为企业买家提供延长的三年 warranty。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The distributor wants a simpler process for handling warranty claims from their retail customers.
exampleZh: distributor 想要一个更简单的处理来自他们零售客户 warranty claim 的流程。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We need to keep spare parts in the local warehouse so repairs do not take three weeks.
exampleZh: 我们需要在本地仓库保留 spare parts 这样维修不会需要三周时间。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We are setting up a service center in the region to handle repairs and customer inquiries locally.
exampleZh: 我们正在该地区建立一个 service center 以本地处理维修和客户咨询。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The installation guide has step-by-step pictures so that even a non-technical person can set up the device.
exampleZh: installation guide 有逐步图片这样即使非技术人员也能设置设备。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The return process for defective units must be clearly communicated to distributors at the start of the partnership.
exampleZh: 缺陷产品的 return process 必须在 partnership 开始时清楚告知分销商。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Channel sales now account for over sixty percent of our total international revenue.
exampleZh: channel sales 现在占我们国际总收入的百分之六十以上。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Direct sales through our own website gives us higher margins but limits our reach.
exampleZh: 通过我们自己网站的 direct sales 给我们更高的利润但限制了我们的覆盖范围。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The franchise model allows us to expand quickly without the capital cost of opening our own stores.
exampleZh: franchise 模式让我们能够快速扩张而无需自己开店的大量资金。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: A hybrid channel approach lets us sell directly online while also building a dealer network.
exampleZh: hybrid channel 方式让我们在建立经销商网络的同时也能直接在线销售。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Our channel strategy for Europe is to start with one exclusive distributor and add resellers in year two.
exampleZh: 我们在欧洲的 channel strategy 是从一个 exclusive distributor 开始第二年再增加 reseller。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Can we start with a trial order of 100 units before committing to a full container?
exampleZh: 我们能不能先下一个 100 台的 trial order 再承诺整柜？
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The retail chain agreed to test our product in five pilot stores for three months.
exampleZh: 这家零售连锁同意在五家 pilot store 测试我们的产品三个月。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We can send you a sample unit at no cost so you can evaluate the build quality yourself.
exampleZh: 我们可以免费寄给你一台 sample unit 让你自己评估做工质量。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The first order is usually smaller while the buyer tests the market response.
exampleZh: first order 通常较小买方同时在测试市场反应。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: If the sell-through is good the reorder will come within six to eight weeks.
exampleZh: 如果 sell-through 好 reorder 会在六到八周内到来。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: I will send you the updated price list with the new wholesale prices for Q3.
exampleZh: 我会发给你更新后的 price list 包含 Q3 新的 wholesale price。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The distributor asked for net-60 credit terms but our standard is net-30.
exampleZh: 分销商要求 net-60 credit terms 但我们的标准是 net-30。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The deposit is thirty percent of the total order value payable before production starts.
exampleZh: deposit 是订单总金额的百分之三十在生产开始前支付。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The balance payment is due once the goods pass the final quality inspection.
exampleZh: balance payment 在货物通过最终质检时到期。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We printed 500 copies of the product brochure for the exhibition next week.
exampleZh: 我们为下周的 exhibition 印了 500 份 product brochure。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Always carry extra business cards because you will run out faster than you think at a trade show.
exampleZh: 总是多带 business card 因为在 trade show 上用得比你想象的快。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We use a QR code on the booth for visitors to fill in the lead form on their phone.
exampleZh: 我们在 booth 上使用 QR code 让参观者在手机上填写 lead form。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We have three booth meetings booked for tomorrow morning with distributors from France.
exampleZh: 明天早上我们有三场 booth meeting 预定了与来自法国的 distributor。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: You need a visitor badge to enter the exhibition hall so register online before you come.
exampleZh: 进入展馆需要 visitor badge 所以来之前先在线注册。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We set up a permanent showroom near the factory so distributors can bring their retail customers.
exampleZh: 我们在工厂附近建了一个 permanent showroom 让 distributor 可以带他们的零售客户来看。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Getting into a retail chain like MediaMarkt or Best Buy can increase your volume by five times.
exampleZh: 进入像 MediaMarkt 或 Best Buy 这样的 retail chain 可以让你的销量增加五倍。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The supermarket channel requires different packaging because the product sits on open shelves.
exampleZh: supermarket 渠道需要不同的 packaging 因为产品放在开放货架上。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Electronics stores give us a better brand presence than general supermarkets.
exampleZh: electronics store 给我们比普通超市更好的品牌展示。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: I did a store visit yesterday and our product was not on the shelf because it was sold out.
exampleZh: 我昨天做了一次 store visit 我们的产品不在货架上因为卖光了。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We provided a free display stand to the retailer so our product stands out from the shelf.
exampleZh: 我们给零售商提供了一个免费的 display stand 让我们的产品从货架上脱颖而出。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We did a two-hour staff training session with the retail team so they can explain the product to customers.
exampleZh: 我们与零售团队进行了两小时的 staff training 让他们能够向客户解释产品。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Technical support is available in English during European business hours via email and chat.
exampleZh: technical support 在欧洲工作时间以英文通过邮件和聊天提供。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The troubleshooting guide covers the ten most common issues and takes about five minutes to read.
exampleZh: troubleshooting guide 涵盖了十个最常见的问题大约需要五分钟阅读。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Out-of-warranty repairs are subject to a service fee that depends on the type of damage.
exampleZh: 保修期外的维修需要支付 service fee 根据损坏类型而定。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We offer a maintenance plan for enterprise customers that covers two on-site visits per year.
exampleZh: 我们为企业客户提供 maintenance plan 每年包含两次现场服务。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: UKCA marking is now required for products sold in Great Britain after Brexit.
exampleZh: UKCA marking 现在是脱欧后在英国销售产品所必需的。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The compliance label must include the model number manufacturer name and the CE mark.
exampleZh: compliance label 必须包含型号制造商名称和 CE 标志。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The warning label about the rechargeable battery must be printed in the local language.
exampleZh: 关于可充电电池的 warning label 必须用当地语言印刷。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: You need to check the local regulation for wireless devices before shipping to that country.
exampleZh: 在发货到该国之前你需要检查无线设备的 local regulation。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Some countries require a separate country approval that takes four to six weeks.
exampleZh: 一些国家需要一个单独的 country approval 需要四到六周。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: Each sales rep is responsible for a specific region and handles both new leads and existing accounts.
exampleZh: 每个 sales rep 负责一个特定区域处理新 leads 和现有客户。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The store manager has the authority to decide which new products to test on the shelves.
exampleZh: store manager 有权决定在货架上测试哪些新产品。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: A good retail placement near the checkout counter can increase impulse purchases dramatically.
exampleZh: 靠近收银台的好的 retail placement 可以大幅增加冲动购买。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The counter display holds six units and fits perfectly next to the cash register.
exampleZh: counter display 可放六台产品完美适配收银机旁边。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: The sales script gives you a structure but do not sound like you are reading from a page.
exampleZh: sales script 给你一个结构但不要听起来像是在念稿。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: The opening line should be about them not about you and it should spark curiosity.
exampleZh: opening line 应该是关于他们的而不是关于你的并且应该引起好奇心。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: I left a voicemail yesterday and will try a callback this afternoon.
exampleZh: 我昨天留了语音邮件今天下午会试一次 callback。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: The goal of the first call is not to sell but to get a meeting request accepted.
exampleZh: 第一通电话的目标不是销售而是让 meeting request 被接受。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We are looking for a regional partner who already has relationships with electronics retailers.
exampleZh: 我们在寻找已经与电子产品零售商有关系的 regional partner。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Only an authorized distributor can use our brand name in their marketing materials.
exampleZh: 只有 authorized distributor 可以在营销材料中使用我们的品牌名称。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Building a dealer network takes time but once it is in place the recurring orders are steady.
exampleZh: 建立 dealer network 需要时间但一旦到位复购订单就会很稳定。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We need to decide whether to use a single distribution channel or multiple channels in each country.
exampleZh: 我们需要决定在各国是使用单一的 distribution channel 还是多渠道。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The partner agreement covers territory sales targets pricing and the term of the relationship.
exampleZh: partner agreement 涵盖了区域销售目标定价和合作期限。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Our channel coverage in Germany is good but we have almost nothing in France yet.
exampleZh: 我们在德国的 channel coverage 不错但在法国几乎还没有。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The renewal term is automatic for another year if both parties do not give notice within 90 days.
exampleZh: 如果双方未在 90 天内通知 renewal term 自动延续一年。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The termination clause allows either party to end the agreement with six months written notice.
exampleZh: termination clause 允许任何一方以六个月书面通知终止协议。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Selling directly on Amazon can create channel conflict with your retail partners.
exampleZh: 直接在 Amazon 上销售可能与你的 retail partner 产生 channel conflict。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The shelf listing process at a large supermarket chain can take three to six months.
exampleZh: 在大型连锁超市的 shelf listing 过程可能需要三到六个月。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Good stock rotation means the oldest units sell first so nothing sits on the shelf past its best date.
exampleZh: 好的 stock rotation 意味着最旧的货先卖出所以没有东西在货架上过期。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We run an in-store demo every Saturday afternoon to show customers how the device works in real life.
exampleZh: 我们每周六下午进行 in-store demo 向客户展示设备在真实生活中的使用效果。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: We need to qualify the lead before spending time on a custom quotation.
exampleZh: 在花时间做定制报价之前我们需要 qualify 这个线索。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: We authorized them as our exclusive distributor for the Benelux region last month.
exampleZh: 我们上个月 authorize 他们成为我们在比荷卢地区的独家分销商。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: The device needs to be certified by an accredited lab before we can apply for CE marking.
exampleZh: 设备需要由认证实验室 certify 之后才能申请 CE 标志。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: We must comply with local electronic waste regulations in every country we sell to.
exampleZh: 我们必须 comply 每个销售国的当地电子废物法规。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: I reached out to three potential distributors this week and two responded positively.
exampleZh: 我这周 reach out 了三个潜在分销商两个回复积极。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: We decided to take on two new dealers in the southern region to improve coverage.
exampleZh: 我们决定在南部地区 take on 两个新经销商以改善覆盖。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: They are asking for exclusive rights to the territory but we are not ready to commit yet.
exampleZh: 他们在要求该地区的 exclusive 权利但我们还没准备好承诺。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: The minimum order quantity is negotiable for a first-time partner who wants to start with a trial order.
exampleZh: 对于想从试单开始的首次合作伙伴 minimum order quantity 是 negotiable 的。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

term: We are looking for a local distributor
example: We are looking for a local distributor who already has relationships with electronics retailers.
exampleZh: We are looking for a local distributor 与电子产品零售商已有关系。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: Let me introduce our new product line which is designed specifically for the European retail market.
exampleZh: 让我 introduce 我们的新产品线专为欧洲零售市场设计。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: I will present the product features and the margin structure at the meeting next Tuesday.
exampleZh: 我会在下周二的会议上 present 产品特点和利润结构。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: Can you discount the first batch so we can test the market with a lower retail price?
exampleZh: 你能 discount 第一批吗这样我们可以用更低的零售价 test 市场。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: We plan to expand into two new countries next quarter once the certification is complete.
exampleZh: 一旦认证完成我们计划下个季度 expand 到两个新国家。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: The new dealer signed up after seeing our product demo at the trade show.
exampleZh: 新经销商在展会上看到我们的产品演示后 sign up 了。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: We need to set up a local service center before the distributor will commit to a large first order.
exampleZh: 在分销商承诺大额 first order 之前我们需要 set up 一个当地服务中心。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: The premium version has a metal casing and a longer battery life for business users.
exampleZh: premium 版有金属外壳和更长的电池续航面向商务用户。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: The entry-level model is priced to compete with local brands and still leave a healthy margin for dealers.
exampleZh: entry-level 型号的定价可以与当地品牌竞争同时仍为经销商留下 healthy margin。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

term: Can we schedule a sales call
topic: Outbound Sales / Cold Call / Email Outreach
example: Can we schedule a sales call for next week to discuss the distributor opportunity in your region.
exampleZh: Can we schedule a sales call 下周讨论你所在地区的分销商机会。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: The margin is too low and the dealer cannot compete with similar products that offer thirty percent.
exampleZh: The margin is too low 经销商无法与提供百分之三十的同类产品竞争。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

term: Can we start with a small order
example: Can we start with a small order of fifty units to test the market before committing to a container.
exampleZh: Can we start with a small order 五十台在承诺整柜之前先测试市场。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: Please send the price list with the wholesale and recommended retail prices for all models.
exampleZh: Please send the price list 包含所有型号的 wholesale 和建议零售价。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

term: We can support your first demo
shortMeaning: 我们可以支持你们的第一次演示
example: We can support your first demo by sending a demo unit and a product trainer for the event.
exampleZh: We can support your first demo 为活动寄送一台 demo unit 和一名产品培训师。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

term: The product is ready for retail
shortMeaning: 产品已准备好进入零售
example: The product is ready for retail with all the packaging compliance labels and a retail-ready display box.
exampleZh: The product is ready for retail 包含所有包装合规标签和零售展示盒。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

term: The buyer asked for a lower price
example: The buyer asked for a lower price so we need to review the volume discount structure.
exampleZh: The buyer asked for a lower price 所以我们需要重新审视批量折扣结构。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: We need certification before launch in that market because the local regulation requires a separate safety approval.
exampleZh: 在那个市场发布之前 We need certification before launch 因为当地法规要求单独的安全审批。
sourceTitle: Original learning sentence

example: We onboarded three new dealers in Southeast Asia this quarter.
exampleZh: 我们本季度在东南亚 onboard 了三家新 dealer。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We cold-called about fifty distributors before finding two serious candidates.
exampleZh: 我们 cold-call 了大约五十家 distributor 才找到两个认真的 candidate。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We showcased the new model at the IFA trade fair and got very positive feedback.
exampleZh: 我们在 IFA trade fair 上 showcase 了新款得到了非常积极的反馈。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We co-branded the packaging with our largest distributor for their local market.
exampleZh: 我们与最大的 distributor 为其本地市场 co-brand 了包装。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We are pushing the premium model because the margin is better for both sides.
exampleZh: 我们在 push 高级型号因为 margin 对双方都更好。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The dealer stocked 200 units of our best-selling model for the holiday season.
exampleZh: dealer 为假日季 stock 了 200 台我们的畅销型号。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We bundled the device with a carrying case and screen protector for a holiday deal.
exampleZh: bundled。我们为假日促销将 device 与 carrying case 和 screen protector bundle 在一起。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We cross-promote with our dealers by featuring their stores on our website.
exampleZh: 我们通过在网站上展示他们的门店来与 dealer cross-promote。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The dealer forecasted 500 units for Q3 which is about twenty percent above last year.
exampleZh: dealer forecast 了 Q3 500 台比去年高约百分之二十。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We unboxed the product live at the booth and people crowded around to watch.
exampleZh: 我们在 booth live unbox 了产品人们围过来观看。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We sampled the product to ten potential dealers and seven placed orders.
exampleZh: 我们向十家 potential dealer sample 了产品其中七家下了订单。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We territory-mapped Europe into five regions with one exclusive dealer each.
exampleZh: 我们将欧洲 territory-map 为五个区域每个区域一家 exclusive dealer。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We signed on three new dealers after the trade show in Berlin.
exampleZh: 在柏林 trade show 后我们 sign on 了三家新 dealer。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Orders started rolling in after the product was featured in a tech magazine.
exampleZh: roll in。产品被 tech magazine 推荐后 orders start rolling in。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The buyer pushed back the delivery date by two weeks because their warehouse is full.
exampleZh: buyer 因为 warehouse 满了将 delivery date push back 了两周。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We walked the buyer through every feature of the device at the booth.
exampleZh: walk through。我们在 booth walk the buyer through 了设备的每个功能。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We shipped out the first container to the US distributor last Monday.
exampleZh: 上周一我们向美国 distributor ship out 了第一个 container。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We priced in the certification cost so the dealer price went up by about two dollars.
exampleZh: 我们将 certification cost price in 了所以 dealer price 上涨了大约两美元。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We tested out the product in a few retail stores before committing to a full launch.
exampleZh: 在承诺全面 launch 之前我们 test out 了产品在几家 retail stores。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We drew up a distribution agreement with clear sales targets and territory boundaries.
exampleZh: 我们 draw up 了一份 distribution agreement 有清晰的 sales targets 和 territory boundaries。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We are trying to break into the Japanese market through a local distributor.
exampleZh: 我们正尝试通过 local distributor break into 日本市场。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The dealer followed through on every lead we sent them and closed over half.
exampleZh: dealer 对我们发给他们的每条 lead follow through 成交了超过一半。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The regional dealer covers three neighbouring countries in Southeast Asia.
exampleZh: regional dealer 覆盖东南亚三个邻国。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The wholesale price is forty percent below the suggested retail price.
exampleZh: wholesale price 比 suggested retail price 低百分之四十。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The product is sellable in the EU now that we have the CE marking.
exampleZh: 产品现在有了 CE marking 在欧盟是 sellable 的了。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The price-sensitive market in this region means we need a lower-cost variant.
exampleZh: 这个地区的 price-sensitive market 意味着我们需要一个 lower-cost variant。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We prefer working with established distributors who already have retail relationships.
exampleZh: 我们更愿意与已有 retail relationships 的 established distributors 合作。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The portable demo kit fits in a backpack and sets up in under five minutes.
exampleZh: portable demo kit 可以放入 backpack 并在五分钟内 setup。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The product is fully compliant with EU safety and EMC standards.
exampleZh: 该产品完全 compliant 符合 EU safety 和 EMC standards。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We provide branded display stands and marketing materials to all dealers.
exampleZh: 我们为所有 dealer 提供 branded display stands 和 marketing materials。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Our price is competitive with similar products but we offer a longer warranty.
exampleZh: 我们的价格与类似产品 competitive 但我们提供更长的 warranty。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The in-demand model is on backorder and dealers are asking for faster delivery.
exampleZh: in-demand 型号处于 backorder 状态 dealer 在要求 faster delivery。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The certified version ships with the CE and FCC logos on the packaging.
exampleZh: certified 版本附带包装上的 CE 和 FCC logos ship。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We signed a dealer in Germany who already sells to our target customer segment.
exampleZh: 我们在德国 sign a dealer 已经在向我们的 target customer segment 销售。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We set the margin at thirty percent for the dealer and fifty percent for the retailer.
exampleZh: set the margin。我们将 margin set 为 dealer 百分之三十 retailer 百分之五十。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We offered a discount on the first order to help the dealer get started.
exampleZh: 我们在 first order 上 offer a discount 以帮助 dealer 起步。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We attend a trade show every quarter to meet new buyers and showcase products.
exampleZh: 我们每季度 attend a trade show 以结识新 buyer 并 showcase products。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We set up a booth at IFA with live demos and product samples for visitors.
exampleZh: 我们在 IFA set up a booth 有 live demos 和 product samples 供访客。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We closed a deal with a chain store for 1000 units to be delivered over three months.
exampleZh: 我们与一家 chain store close a deal 1000 台分三个月交付。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We negotiated the terms for three weeks before both sides were happy with the agreement.
exampleZh: 我们 negotiate the terms 了三周双方才对 agreement 满意。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We set a sales target of 200 units per month for the first year of the agreement.
exampleZh: 我们为 agreement 第一年 set a sales target 每月 200 台。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Check the certification requirements for each country before shipping the product there.
exampleZh: 在向每个国家 ship 产品之前 check the certification requirements。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We train the dealer on product features and common customer questions.
exampleZh: 我们 train the dealer 关于产品功能和常见客户问题。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We sent a sample to the buyer and they placed an order within a week.
exampleZh: 我们 send a sample 给 buyer 他们在一周内就下了订单。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We quoted a price based on an annual volume of 5000 units with quarterly shipments.
exampleZh: 我们基于年量 5000 台按季度 shipment quote a price。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We set up distribution in three European countries through local partners.
exampleZh: 我们通过 local partners 在三个欧洲国家 set up distribution。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: We are looking for local dealers in your country.
shortMeaning: 我们在贵国寻找本地经销商
example: We are looking for local dealers in your country who already have retail channels.
exampleZh: We are looking for local dealers in your country.。我们在贵国寻找已有 retail channels 的 local dealers。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Can we start with a trial order first.
example: Can we start with a trial order first before committing to a larger minimum quantity.
exampleZh: Can we start with a trial order first.。在承诺更大的 minimum quantity 之前能先 start with a trial order 吗。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: The dealer margin needs to be higher.
example: The dealer margin needs to be higher or they cannot cover their marketing costs.
exampleZh: The dealer margin needs to be higher.。dealer margin 得更高否则他们无法 cover 其 marketing costs。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Do you need exclusive rights for your region.
example: Do you need exclusive rights for your region because that changes the minimum order.
exampleZh: Do you need exclusive rights for your region.。贵区需要 exclusive rights 吗因为那会改变 minimum order。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: We need local certification before we can sell there.
shortMeaning: 得先取得当地认证才能销售
example: We need local certification before we can sell there and the process takes about two months.
exampleZh: We need local certification before we can sell there.。我们需要 local certification 才能在那里销售这个过程大约需要两个月。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Can we get a better price for a larger order.
shortMeaning: 更大订单能有更好价格吗
example: Can we get a better price for a larger order of five thousand units instead of one thousand.
exampleZh: Can we get a better price for a larger order.。五千台而不是一千台的更大订单能有 better price 吗。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: How soon can you ship after we place an order.
example: How soon can you ship after we place an order because our retail season starts soon.
exampleZh: How soon can you ship after we place an order.。我们下单后多久能 ship 因为我们的 retail season 很快就要开始了。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: The packaging needs to be in the local language.
example: The packaging needs to be in the local language or customs will not clear the shipment.
exampleZh: The packaging needs to be in the local language.。packaging 需要是 local language 否则海关不会 clear the shipment。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: We can offer a display stand for your store.
shortMeaning: 可以给你的店提供展示架
example: We can offer a display stand for your store to help customers find the product easily.
exampleZh: We can offer a display stand for your store.。可以给你的店提供 display stand 以帮助客户轻松找到产品。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: The shipping cost needs to be included in the quote.
shortMeaning: 运费需要包含在报价里
example: The shipping cost needs to be included in the quote so we know the total landed price.
exampleZh: The shipping cost needs to be included in the quote.。shipping cost 需要包含在 quote 里这样我们才知道 total landed price。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: What is your warranty policy for overseas dealers.
shortMeaning: 海外经销商的保修政策是什么
example: What is your warranty policy for overseas dealers and how do you handle returns.
exampleZh: What is your warranty policy for overseas dealers.。overseas dealers 的 warranty policy 是什么以及如何处理 returns。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: We need a demo unit for the trade show next month.
example: We need a demo unit for the trade show next month to show to potential buyers.
exampleZh: We need a demo unit for the trade show next month.。我们需要下月 trade show 的 demo unit 以展示给 potential buyers。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Our partner distributes our products to over 200 retail stores across the country.
exampleZh: 我们的 partner 将产品 distribute 到全国超过 200 家 retail stores。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The product retails for 199 dollars in most markets with slight regional variations.
exampleZh: 该产品在大多数市场 retail 为 199 美元有轻微的地区差异。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We floor-planned the product section to highlight the premium model at eye level.
exampleZh: 我们 floor-plan 了产品区将 premium model 放在 eye level 突出展示。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The dealer restocked twice this month because the product is selling faster than expected.
exampleZh: dealer 这个月 restock 了两次因为产品卖得比预期快。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We net-priced the order after deducting the volume discount and the promotional rebate.
exampleZh: 我们在扣除 volume discount 和 promotional rebate 后 net-price 了订单。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We vetted the potential dealer by checking their credit history and client references.
exampleZh: 我们通过检查 credit history 和 client references 来 vet potential dealer。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We worked out the landed cost including shipping duty and insurance.
exampleZh: 我们 work out 了 landed cost 包括运费关税和保险。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We ironed out the remaining contract details over a one-hour call.
exampleZh: 我们通过一小时的电话 iron out 了剩余的 contract details。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We are ramping up production to meet the demand from our new European dealers.
exampleZh: 我们在 ramp up 生产以满足 new European dealers 的需求。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Please fill in the dealer application form and send it back by email.
exampleZh: 请 fill in the dealer application form 并通过 email 发回。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The first batch sold through in under two weeks and the dealer asked for more.
exampleZh: 第一批在不到两周内 sell through dealer 要求更多。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The fast-moving SKUs need to be restocked every two weeks during peak season.
exampleZh: fast-moving SKUs 在 peak season 需要每两周 restock 一次。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We offered a discount on the slow-moving colours to clear them before the new season.
exampleZh: 我们在 new season 前对 slow-moving 颜色提供 discount 以清仓。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The certification-ready product has been tested against all required standards.
exampleZh: certification-ready 产品已经按照 all required standards 测试过了。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The product is market-ready with local packaging certification and warranty support.
exampleZh: 该产品是 market-ready 的有 local packaging certification 和 warranty support。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We filed a certification with the FCC and expect approval in about six weeks.
exampleZh: 我们向 FCC file a certification 预计约六周后获得 approval。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We pitched the product to a buyer from a major retail chain at the booth.
exampleZh: 我们在 booth 向一位 major retail chain 的 buyer pitch the product。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We set the wholesale price at a level that gives the dealer a healthy margin.
exampleZh: set the wholesale price。我们将 wholesale price set 在给 dealer healthy margin 的水平。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: One dealer covers the territory of Germany Austria and Switzerland exclusively.
exampleZh: 一家 dealer exclusively cover the territory 德国奥地利和瑞士。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Can we get a better price for volume orders.
shortMeaning: 批量订单能有更好价格吗
example: Can we get a better price for volume orders because our forecast is over 10000 units.
exampleZh: Can we get a better price for volume orders.。批量订单能有 better price 吗因为我们的 forecast 超过 10000 台。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: We need a local service partner for warranty repairs.
shortMeaning: 需要本地服务商来保修
example: We need a local service partner for warranty repairs because shipping back to us is too slow.
exampleZh: We need a local service partner for warranty repairs.。需要 local service partner 来保修因为 ship 回我们太慢了。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: The dealer agreement needs to be in both languages.
shortMeaning: 经销商协议需要双语版
example: The dealer agreement needs to be in both languages for it to be legally binding there.
exampleZh: The dealer agreement needs to be in both languages.。dealer agreement 需要 bilingual 才能在当地 legally binding。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Can you provide sales training for our team.
shortMeaning: 能给我们的团队提供销售培训吗
example: Can you provide sales training for our team so we can explain the product features better.
exampleZh: Can you provide sales training for our team.。能给我们的团队提供 sales training 吗这样我们能更好地解释 product features。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Whats the MOQ for the first order.
example: Whats the MOQ for the first order because we want to test the market before a large commitment.
exampleZh: Whats the MOQ for the first order.。首单的 MOQ 是多少因为我们想在 large commitment 前 test the market。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We back-ordered the premium model because demand is three times our production rate.
exampleZh: 我们 back-order 了 premium model 因为需求是生产速度的三倍。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We set the MSRP at 299 dollars which gives dealers a comfortable margin.
exampleZh: set-msrp。我们将 MSRP set 为 299 美元这给 dealers 舒适的 margin。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We marked down the older model to make room for the new version arriving next month.
exampleZh: mark-down。我们 mark down 了 older model 为下月到货的 new version 腾出空间。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We plan to go-to-market in Europe through a network of regional distributors.
exampleZh: 我们计划通过 regional distributors 网络在欧洲 go-to-market。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: I will get back to you with a detailed quote by the end of the week.
exampleZh: 我会在周末前 get back to you 附上 detailed quote。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Can you send over the product catalog and the wholesale price list.
exampleZh: 能 send over the product catalog 和 wholesale price list 吗。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We locked in the exclusive deal with the dealer for the next three years.
exampleZh: 我们与 dealer lock in 了接下来三年的 exclusive deal。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The floor-ready packaging includes a display tray and a hanging tab for retail.
exampleZh: floor-ready packaging 包括 display tray 和 hanging tab 用于 retail。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The product is dutiable at eight percent when imported into the EU.
exampleZh: 该产品在进口到 EU 时是 dutiable 的税率为百分之八。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We test-marketed the product in two cities before rolling out nationwide.
exampleZh: 在 nationwide rollout 之前我们在两个城市 test-market 了产品。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We placed a trial order of 50 units to test the product in our local market.
exampleZh: 我们 place a trial order 50 台以在我们的 local market test the product。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We renewed the agreement for another two years after a strong sales performance.
exampleZh: 在强劲的 sales performance 后我们 renew the agreement 再续两年。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We invited the dealer to tour the factory so they can see the quality process.
exampleZh: 我们邀请 dealer tour the factory 让他们亲眼看到 quality process。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: The lead time is about six weeks for this model.
shortMeaning: 这个型号的交期大约六周
example: The lead time is about six weeks for this model because of the component shortage.
exampleZh: The lead time is about six weeks for this model.。这个型号的 lead time 大约六周因为 component shortage。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Can you share your retail channel experience.
shortMeaning: 能分享贵方的零售渠道经验吗
example: Can you share your retail channel experience and which brands you currently carry.
exampleZh: Can you share your retail channel experience.。能分享贵方的 retail channel experience 以及目前 carry 哪些 brands 吗。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: We want to start with a smaller commitment.
shortMeaning: 我们想从较小的承诺开始
example: We want to start with a smaller commitment until we see how the product performs here.
exampleZh: We want to start with a smaller commitment.。我们想从 smaller commitment 开始直到看到 product 在这里的 performs 如何。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We demoed the product at three stores and the store managers all wanted to place orders.
exampleZh: 我们在三家门店 demo 了产品店长们都想要下单。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We quoted the dealer a price of 85 dollars per unit for orders over 500 units.
exampleZh: 我们为超过 500 台的订单向 dealer quote 了每台 85 美元的价格。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We appointed them as our exclusive distributor for the Nordic region.
exampleZh: 我们 appoint 他们为 Nordic region 的 exclusive distributor。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The retailer delisted our product after six months because the margin was too low.
exampleZh: retailer 因为 margin 太低在六个月后 delist 了我们的产品。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We subsidize the first demo unit so the dealer can show it without upfront cost.
exampleZh: 我们 subsidize 第一台 demo unit 这样 dealer 可以无 upfront cost 展示。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We declare the correct HS code on the commercial invoice to avoid customs delays.
exampleZh: 我们在 commercial invoice 上 declare 正确的 HS code 以避免海关延误。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We translated the user manual into six languages for the European market.
exampleZh: 我们将 user manual translate 成了六种语言以面向 European market。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We localized the packaging with local voltage information and warranty terms.
exampleZh: 我们用当地 voltage information 和 warranty terms localize 了包装。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The dealer services the product locally which saves customers from shipping back to us.
exampleZh: dealer 在本地 service 产品这为客户省去了 ship 回我们的麻烦。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We renewed the distribution agreement for another three years after strong results.
exampleZh: 在强劲 results 后我们 renew 了 distribution agreement 再续三年。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We terminated the agreement because the dealer was not meeting the minimum sales target.
exampleZh: 我们 terminate 了 agreement 因为 dealer 没有达到 minimum sales target。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We co-market with our dealers by sharing the cost of local trade show booths.
exampleZh: 我们通过分摊当地 trade show booths 的成本来与 dealer co-market。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We shortlisted three distributors based on their market coverage and financial health.
exampleZh: 我们根据 market coverage 和 financial health shortlist 了三家 distributor。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We converted about thirty percent of the leads from the trade show into actual orders.
exampleZh: 我们将 trade show 大约百分之三十的 leads convert 为实际 orders。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Our existing dealer referred us to a distributor in a neighbouring country.
exampleZh: 我们现有的 dealer refer 了我们给一个邻国的 distributor。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We handed over the sales leads from the trade show to the local dealer for follow-up.
exampleZh: 我们将 trade show 的 sales leads hand over 给当地 dealer 进行跟进。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: I will drop by your store next Tuesday to check how the display looks.
exampleZh: 我下周二会 drop by 你的门店看看 display 怎么样。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We lined up three distributor meetings for the first day of the trade show.
exampleZh: 我们为 trade show 的第一天 line up 了三场 distributor meetings。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We are ready to move forward with the agreement once the legal review is done.
exampleZh: 一旦 legal review 完成我们就准备 move forward with the agreement。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We turned down the offer because the exclusivity clause was too restrictive.
exampleZh: 我们 turn down 了 offer 因为 exclusivity clause 太 restrictive。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We sent them a demo unit to try out in their store for two weeks.
exampleZh: 我们发给他们一台 demo unit 在店里 try out 两周。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: I will check in with the dealer next month to see how the sales are going.
exampleZh: 我下个月会 check in with the dealer 看看销售情况如何。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We ran through the product features with the buyer in under ten minutes.
exampleZh: 我们在不到十分钟内 run through the product features with the buyer。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The non-exclusive agreement allows us to work with multiple dealers in the same region.
exampleZh: non-exclusive agreement 允许我们在同一区域与多家 dealer 合作。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Only authorized dealers can sell our products and display our brand name.
exampleZh: 只有 authorized dealers 可以 sell our products 并 display our brand name。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The retail-ready packaging has a barcode a hanging tab and clear product photos.
exampleZh: retail-ready packaging 有条形码悬挂标签和清晰的产品照片。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The demo-ready unit is fully charged and loaded with the latest software.
exampleZh: demo-ready unit 已充满电并 loaded with the latest software。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Our channel-friendly pricing leaves enough margin for both the dealer and the retailer.
exampleZh: 我们的 channel-friendly pricing 为 dealer 和 retailer 留出了足够 margin。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We have region-specific packaging for the EU with CE marking and EU warranty terms.
exampleZh: 我们有针对 EU 的 region-specific packaging 带有 CE marking 和 EU warranty terms。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The easy-to-install product takes the customer less than five minutes to set up.
exampleZh: easy-to-install 产品让客户在不到五分钟内完成设置。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The serviceable design means any local repair shop can replace the main components.
exampleZh: serviceable design 意味着任何当地维修店都可以 replace the main components。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The suitable-for-retail packaging is compact eye-catching and has all the required labels.
exampleZh: suitable-for-retail packaging 紧凑醒目并有所有 required labels。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We qualify a distributor by checking their sales history and existing brand portfolio.
exampleZh: 我们通过检查 sales history 和 existing brand portfolio 来 qualify a distributor。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: The best way to convince a buyer is to demo the device in person at their store.
exampleZh: convince a buyer 最好的方式是 in person 在店里 demo the device。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We quoted the channel price based on an annual volume commitment of 3000 units.
exampleZh: 我们基于年 commitment 3000 台来 quote the channel price。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We authorized a reseller in each major city after a three-month trial period.
exampleZh: 在三个月的 trial period 后我们在每个主要城市 authorize a reseller。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We onboard the partner with a training session and a starter kit of marketing materials.
exampleZh: 我们用 training session 和 marketing materials starter kit 来 onboard the partner。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We train the sales team on the key product features and the most common objections.
exampleZh: 我们 train the sales team 关于关键产品 feature 和最常见 objections。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We registered the device with the local wireless authority before importing.
exampleZh: 在进口前我们向当地无线管理机构 register the device。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We cleared customs in three days because all the paperwork was correctly filled out.
exampleZh: 因为所有文件 correctly filled out 我们在三天内 clear customs。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We translated the manual into the local language and had a native speaker review it.
exampleZh: translate the manual。我们将 manual translate 成当地语言并请 native speaker review。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We scheduled a follow-up call for next Tuesday to discuss the wholesale pricing.
exampleZh: 我们 schedule a follow-up call 下周二讨论 wholesale pricing。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: Can you send over the price list for all models including the optional accessories.
exampleZh: 能 send over the price list 所有型号包括 optional accessories 吗。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We shortlisted a distributor that already works with two complementary brands.
exampleZh: 我们 shortlist a distributor 已经与两个 complementary brands 合作。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We converted the lead from the trade show within two weeks with a quick demo and quote.
exampleZh: 我们在两周内通过 quick demo 和 quote convert the lead from the trade show。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

example: We booked a booth meeting with the retail buyer for the second day of the show.
exampleZh: 我们为展会的第二天 book a booth meeting with the retail buyer。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Can we schedule a follow-up call for next week.
shortMeaning: 能安排下周跟进电话吗
example: Can we schedule a follow-up call for next week to go over the wholesale pricing in detail.
exampleZh: Can we schedule a follow-up call for next week.。能 schedule a follow-up call 下周详细讨论 wholesale pricing 吗。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Please send over the product catalog and price list.
shortMeaning: 请发产品目录和价格表过来
example: Please send over the product catalog and price list so we can review the full range.
exampleZh: Please send over the product catalog and price list.。请 send over the product catalog 和 price list 这样我们可以 review the full range。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: We need to qualify this distributor before signing.
shortMeaning: 签约前需要审查这个经销商
example: We need to qualify this distributor before signing by checking their market reputation.
exampleZh: We need to qualify this distributor before signing.。签约前需要 qualify this distributor 通过检查他们的 market reputation。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: The margin is too low for retail partners.
shortMeaning: 零售合作伙伴的利润空间太低
example: The margin is too low for retail partners because they need at least forty percent to cover costs.
exampleZh: The margin is too low for retail partners.。margin 对 retail partners 太低了他们需要至少百分之四十来 cover costs。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Can you demo the device in our store next week.
shortMeaning: 下周能在我们店里演示设备吗
example: Can you demo the device in our store next week so our team can see how it works.
exampleZh: Can you demo the device in our store next week.。下周能在我们店里 demo the device 吗这样我们的团队可以看到它如何 work。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: The partner is asking for exclusive rights in their region.
shortMeaning: 合作方在要求他们地区的独家权
example: The partner is asking for exclusive rights in their region and we need to decide soon.
exampleZh: The partner is asking for exclusive rights in their region.。合作方在要求他们地区的 exclusive rights 我们需要尽快 decide。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: We can start with a trial order of 50 units.
example: We can start with a trial order of 50 units so you can test the market response.
exampleZh: We can start with a trial order of 50 units.。可以从 50 台的 trial order 开始这样你可以 test the market response。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: The retailer asked for a listing fee to put us on the shelf.
shortMeaning: 零售商要了上架费才让我们上架
example: The retailer asked for a listing fee to put us on the shelf and we are negotiating the amount.
exampleZh: The retailer asked for a listing fee to put us on the shelf.。retailer 要了 listing fee 才让我们上架我们正在 negotiate the amount。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Please translate the user manual into the local language.
shortMeaning: 请将用户手册翻译成本地语言
example: Please translate the user manual into the local language before we ship the first batch.
exampleZh: Please translate the user manual into the local language.。请在 ship first batch 之前将 user manual translate 成 local language。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: The product needs local certification before import.
shortMeaning: 产品需要当地认证才能进口
example: The product needs local certification before import and the testing lab says it takes six weeks.
exampleZh: The product needs local certification before import.。产品需要 local certification 才能 import testing lab 说得花六周。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: Can you handle warranty claims locally for your customers.
shortMeaning: 能为你的客户本地处理保修吗
example: Can you handle warranty claims locally for your customers so they do not need to ship back.
exampleZh: Can you handle warranty claims locally for your customers.。能为你的客户本地 handle warranty claims 吗这样他们不用 ship back。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: We should train the dealer team before the launch.
shortMeaning: 上线前应该培训经销商团队
example: We should train the dealer team before the launch so they can answer customer questions.
exampleZh: We should train the dealer team before the launch.。上线前应该 train the dealer team 这样他们能 answer customer questions。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: This market is very price-sensitive for this type of product.
shortMeaning: 这个市场对这类产品非常价格敏感
example: This market is very price-sensitive for this type of product and we may need a lower-spec model.
exampleZh: This market is very price-sensitive for this type of product.。这个市场对这类产品非常 price-sensitive 我们可能需要 lower-spec model。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence

term: The distributor can cover three neighbouring countries.
shortMeaning: 这个经销商可以覆盖三个邻国
example: The distributor can cover three neighbouring countries and already has retail partners there.
exampleZh: The distributor can cover three neighbouring countries.。这个 distributor 可以 cover three neighbouring countries 在那里已有 retail partners。
sourceTitle: Original smart hardware channel sales learning sentence
